name: Cranberry Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, sugar, oil and pumpkin; mix well.
2. In a separate bowl, combine dry ingredients (flour, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt). Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
3. Pour the pumpkin mixture into the well of the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Stir in the chopped cranberries.
5. Spoon the batter evenly into two greased and floured 8 x 3-3/4 x 2-1/2 inch pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
